4/6/26

  • As a software provider, are you selling the software, or the thing the software accomplishes?
  • If the former, then your business is now worth much less given LLMs.
  • If the latter, then there's no problem, and it's possibly even good.
  • The distinction matters because it determines how you respond to AI disruption.
  • Most software companies haven't even asked themselves this question yet.
  • Improving the software production cycle with LLMs is like trying to add a new room to a house that is on fire.
  • The fundamentals of how software gets created are being reorganized as we watch.
  • You can't optimize a process that is being replaced wholesale.
  • Focus on the new thing, not on improving the old thing.
  • When trying to grab people's attention with your writing, you have to stand out from the average.
  • For example, imagine getting a grant application reviewed.
  • Try to think of all of the other things in your category the reviewer will see.
  • Imagine the average of all of those. That's your landscape you need to stand out from.
  • Whatever is surprising based on that baseline is your payload.

3/30/26

  • Ecosystem dynamics are often counterintuitive because they operate at a scale that individual organisms can't perceive.
  • The health of the whole emerges from simple local interactions.
  • You can't understand an ecosystem by studying individual organisms in isolation.
  • The relationships between organisms matter more than the organisms themselves.
  • Platform markets have a natural tendency toward consolidation, but the consolidation is never complete.
  • There are always niches where smaller players thrive.
  • The edges of a platform ecosystem are where the interesting innovation happens.
  • See also the archive doc for older editions.

3/23/26

  • Whale falls create entire ecosystems from death.
  • When a large platform dies, its carcass feeds an entire community.
  • The nutrients sustain new life for years.
  • This is how creative destruction actually works at the ecosystem level.
